CustomField.formula: IF(pro_Closed_Manually__c = TRUE, 'Closed - Target Manually Updated', IF(pro_Target_Readjusted__c = TRUE, 'Closed - Target Readjusted', IF(pro_Asset_in_Deal__c != NULL, 'Closed - LOI', IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Contract__r.leaseworks__Extended_On__c)), pro_Contract_Extended__c = TRUE) , 'Closed - Contract Extended', IF( pro_Target__r.pro_End_Date__c < TODAY(), 'Open - Target Date Exceeded', 'Open')))))
CustomField.label: Outcome
